channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: OpenAI will launch GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna models publicly this Thursday
item.description: Early testers report major improvements in math and coding.
item.content:encoded:
Early testers report major improvements in math and coding.

Original source: https://cryptobriefing.com/openai-to-launch-gpt-56-sol-terra-luna-models-globally-this-thursday/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/65f5lo27

  • Views: 47,943
  • Likes: 1,002
  • Bookmarks: 46
  • Quotes: 4
  • Replies: 67
  • Posts: 7

Top authors

  • Sebastien Bubeck
  • Boris Power
  • kache
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Alex Volkov @ AI Engineer
"I haven’t needed to check the code I’ve written in two months" looks like OpenAI had the model for a while

item.title: Chinese AI startup MiniMax plans to open-source a 2.7 trillion-parameter model named M3 Pro in Q3
item.description: The upcoming release was originally reported by The Information.
item.content:encoded:
The upcoming release was originally reported by The Information.

Original source: https://www.theinformation.com/briefings/exclusive-chinas-minimax-plans-launch-2-7-trillion-parameter-model?rc=bfliih

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/pxtj76la

  • Views: 94,148
  • Likes: 1,189
  • Bookmarks: 161
  • Quotes: 15
  • Replies: 78
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Chubby♨️
  • Zephyr
Huge: China’s MiniMax Plans to Launch 2.7-Trillion Parameter Model (MiniMax Pro) tl;dr MiniMax is preparing a 2.7T parameter open-source model, potentially launching as early as Q3. That would make it far larger than any Chinese model currently on the market, and over 6x bigger than MiniMax’s current M3 model. China’s open-source AI wave is not slowing down. Looks like they just started. Via The Information

item.title: Albert Gu teases a late-night ICML after-party hosted by AI voice startup Cartesia
item.description: The social event is scheduled for Thursday night during the conference.
item.content:encoded:
The social event is scheduled for Thursday night during the conference.

Original source: https://luma.com/gy1b4ryq

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/w8yyonr6

  • Views: 15,725
  • Likes: 97
  • Bookmarks: 14
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 6
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Yisong Yue
  • Albert Gu
  • Tanishq, Ph.D. at ICML
  • Nan Jiang
Be there or be cubic.

item.title: Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey argues the optimal workflow for modern content production is ai-fed, human-finished
item.description: Investor Jason Calacanis supported the view as directionally correct.
item.content:encoded:
Investor Jason Calacanis supported the view as directionally correct.

Original source: https://fedresources.com/the-human-ai-handshake-redesigning-workflows-for-2026/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/jd7kzup0

  • Views: 206,754
  • Likes: 2,281
  • Bookmarks: 203
  • Quotes: 68
  • Replies: 408
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • jack
  • @jason
@jack @Marell_Evans Feels directionally correct

item.title: SemiAnalysis projects Anthropic will reach $1 billion in quarterly profit and process 13 quadrillion monthly tokens by late 2026
item.description: The firm's financial model suggests Anthropic could reach a $6 trillion valuation.
item.content:encoded:
The firm's financial model suggests Anthropic could reach a $6 trillion valuation.

Original source: https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/anthropic-3q26-profit-over-1b-the

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ts9o7y5r

  • Views: 107,610
  • Likes: 594
  • Bookmarks: 230
  • Quotes: 8
  • Replies: 31
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Zephyr
https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/anthropic-3q26-profit-over-1b-the

item.title: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince steps in to resolve account email limit for Nomad List founder Pieter Levels
item.description: Prince personally lifted the system-wide sending limit for Levels.
item.content:encoded:
Prince personally lifted the system-wide sending limit for Levels.

Original source: https://x.com/levelsio/status/2074809093030609356/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gwekiig0

  • Views: 78,944
  • Likes: 602
  • Bookmarks: 104
  • Quotes: 4
  • Replies: 126
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • @levelsio
  • Matthew Prince 🌥
@levelsio @Cloudflare I just want to nitpick, 10000/10000 is not OVER quota

item.title: Brad Gerstner says enterprise buyers are shifting budget to closed-source frontier models over maintaining multi-model optionality
item.description: Frontier labs build lock-in using proprietary memory and reasoning layers
item.content:encoded:
Frontier labs build lock-in using proprietary memory and reasoning layers

Original source: https://x.com/ayus_h/status/2074740322106749000

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gw3h6qbz

  • Views: 38,558
  • Likes: 103
  • Bookmarks: 39
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 17
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Brad Gerstner
  • Nikesh Arora
@nikesharora Percentage share of wallet / dollars is going up at closed source / frontier models over last 6 months. Decision makers are saying with their choices that the advantages accruing to a single model outweigh the downside of being single threaded for now. 🧐🧐

item.title: ZML AI open-sources LLMD, an inference server that streams weights directly from Hugging Face without local storage
item.description: The production stack supports NVIDIA, AMD, and TPU hardware.
item.content:encoded:
The production stack supports NVIDIA, AMD, and TPU hardware.

Original source: https://ai.meta.com/blog/llama-4-multimodal-intelligence/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/rsk9vrjo

  • Views: 6,949
  • Likes: 21
  • Bookmarks: 6
  • Replies: 5
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Yann LeCun
  • Julien Chaumond
Congrats to the @zml_ai team on the release of LLMD One thing I absolutely love is that the model layers are loaded directly from the network (from @huggingface OFC), in streaming mode (no local file) which makes a lot of sense for production deployment

item.title: AI developer Teortaxes probes Claude-fable-5 on OpenRouter, triggering an immediate content safety block
item.description: The model generated a brief thought process before the block.
item.content:encoded:
The model generated a brief thought process before the block.

Original source: https://x.com/teortaxesTex/status/2074774636219244939/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7cde7wjh

  • Views: 8,442
  • Likes: 121
  • Bookmarks: 5
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 11
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • kache
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
We urgently need a Fable class model that's not from this shit ass company. I don't care if it's bad at bioweapons and hacking the Three Gorges Dam, I'll find other means for that if the need ever arises

item.title: Miles Brundage says the AI capability gap between datacenter and local hardware spans multiple years
item.description: Local models require optimization for intelligence per token per second.
item.content:encoded:
Local models require optimization for intelligence per token per second.

Original source: https://x.com/Miles_Brundage/status/2074756179004441043

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/1kzzsfek

  • Views: 4,923
  • Likes: 51
  • Bookmarks: 8
  • Replies: 8
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Miles Brundage
  • 🎭
@Miles_Brundage definitely. and at least currently this is also the line at which a lot of the inference economics flip right? if you have a cluster you want to be batching as much as possible personal hardware, you probably want to intelligence Max per token second
